query: Identify the aircraft located on the flight deck and determine its heading direction in degrees relative to north.

input.attribute: orientation of aircraft in degrees relative to north.

final_answer: The aircraft is oriented on a heading of 120 degrees relative to north.

evaluation.question: Are the reported heading values of the aircraft within the acceptable range of 108 to 132 degrees?
Does the response specify that this heading is measured relative to north?
